  • [ - ] haunani - member since 21-Nov-25

    Metz defend deep and stay organised, looking to frustrate and make the most of direct transitions and set pieces when they win the ball. Lille control possession more and build patiently through midfield and wide areas, pressing to force turnovers and create the better chances. The match usually sees Lille dictate rhythm while Metz stay compact and hope to hurt them on the break.
